sections.heading: What is Hindi Numbers?
sections.body: Type Hindi numbers from 0-100 and common numerals. This lesson covers the essential concepts you need to understand to get started effectively.

sections.heading: Key Concepts
sections.body:
Hindi Numbers is a fundamental concept that every developer needs to master. Here are the core ideas:

1. Core Principle: The main idea behind Hindi Numbers is understanding how different components work together.

2. Application: In practice, you'll use Hindi Numbers every day when building applications. It's one of those skills that becomes second nature.

3. Common Patterns: Most Hindi Numbers implementations follow predictable patterns. Once you recognize them, you can apply them quickly.

sections.heading: Why This Matters
sections.body: Understanding Hindi Numbers is crucial because it builds the foundation for everything that follows. Master this topic and you'll find subsequent concepts much easier to learn.
